# redis_string (Resource)

Manages a Redis string key-value pair (`SET`).

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "redis_string" "example" {
  key   = "app:version"
  value = "1.2.3"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `key` (String) The Redis key.
- `value` (String) The string value to store.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The Redis key, used as the resource identifier.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import redis_string.example "app:version"
```
